title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.307 - Farmers and Ranchers Day designated for July 20
text:
9.307.  Farmers and Ranchers Day designated for July 20. — July twentieth of each year shall be designated as "Farmers and Ranchers Day" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to recognize the positive impact farming and ranching families have on this state.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
